overview: Gates Institute of Technology (GITES), established in 2001, is a premier autonomous engineering institution located in Gooty, Anantapur district, Andhra Pradesh. The college is part of the GATES Group and is situated on a sprawling 25.33-acre campus with a dedicated 10-acre green belt. Notably, it is one of the few fully solar-powered institutes in the state, utilizing a 200 KV on-site solar plant. The institution focuses on providing affordable technical education to rural students while maintaining high academic standards and industry-relevant curriculum.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Several undergraduate programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI, Data Science, ECE, EEE, ME, Civil, Cyber Security)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for reserved) + AP EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET / CMAT rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (Machine Design, Power Systems, VLSI, CSE)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / AP PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via entrance exam ranks. 30% (Category B) are Management Quota seats filled based on merit or JEE Main scores. Counseling Code: GATS.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; Registration (Late Fee): April 2026; AP ICET 2026: July 9–13, 2026; Counseling: August 2026.

facilities: ICT Enabled Classrooms & Tech-enabled Learning Zones
Central Library with Digital Resource Center
Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transportation (Fleet covering major points in Anantapur district)
campus.specialNote: GITES is distinguished by its 10-acre green belt and commitment to sustainability via solar power. The institute emphasizes 'Innovation and Research' through various campus-run technical clubs and a dedicated Training & Placement Cell that provides intensive personality development programs.

contact.address: NH-44, Gooty, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh - 515401
